specific_question: How many employees were on Elexion Automotive's sales operations team as of December 2024?
answer: As of December 2024, Elexion Automotive's sales operations team consisted of 47 employees, with an average of 3.2 years of tenure.
dr_question: If Elexion Automotive shifts from dealership franchising to a direct-to-customer sales model, how could it capture the benefits of the transition to drive sales and higher margins in 2027?
